name: WLF_LEARN_RELATIONS
description: Table to store relation information of learning item to learning organization.

columns.Name: LEARN_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: LEARN_RELATION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Learn Relation Number

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to source object id

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Source object type.

columns.Name: PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning organization reconcile job processing date

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to related object id

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Related object type.

columns.Name: RELATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Relation Type

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column represents status of the relation object {ACTIVE, DELETED}.

columns.Name: ADDED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the relation object active date

columns.Name: REMOVED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the relation object removed date

columns.Name: POSITION
columns.Comments: Position sequence

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the person identifier who created the content object.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: IN_ELASTIC
columns.Comments: Indentifier to indicate the row needs processing for elastic index
